prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone night street photo shot with an ultra-wide 3.8 mm focal length, close-up framing. The subject is a young androgynous person with short platinum-blond layered bob hair standing very close beside a brightly lit Japanese vending machine on the left side of the frame. The camera is held close at chest-to-face height with a wide-angle perspective, making the vending machine feel large and near while the dark city street recedes into blur on the right. The subject’s face is intentionally covered by a plain opaque square privacy block in muted beige-gray, centered over the face. They wear an oversized soft gray hoodie with long sleeves over a white iridescent, sparkly idol-style blouse and dress with rhinestone trim; one hand is raised near the vending machine buttons with the sleeve covering most of the hand. The vending machine contains visible rows of bottled drinks, especially Pocari Sweat bottles, glowing cold blue-white from internal lighting; show blue price labels including 130 yen, 140 yen, and 150 yen and a vertical row of round black selection buttons. Background: a narrow nighttime urban Japanese street with dark building silhouettes, scattered neon and shop lights, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections on the vending machine glass. Style: candid documentary phone snapshot, natural skin-and-fabric texture, cool vending-machine light on the subject, high ISO night realism, slight lens distortion from the ultra-wide lens, no beauty retouching, no watermark. Use a vertical 9:16 composition.
